meta.title: Strategic Overview
meta.excerpt: Executive summary of the complete system architecture, technology decisions, and strategic documentation hub for all roles.

seo.metaDescription: Executive summary covering system vision, technology stack, Strapi CMS decision, security architecture, and role-based documentation pathways.

blocks.content: The Strategic Overview section provides high-level architecture documentation suitable for decision makers, technical leaders, and new team members seeking system-wide understanding.

blocks.title: System Vision & Principles
blocks.description: Complete architecture philosophy, design principles, and strategic decisions

blocks.description: Business case, ROI analysis, and technology selection rationale

blocks.content: Choose the documentation path that matches your role and responsibilities:

features.title: For CTOs & Technical Leaders
features.description: Security architecture overview, defense-in-depth patterns, technology selection rationale, and executive summaries

features.title: For Backend Developers
features.description: Strapi configuration, content type modeling, API design patterns, and database architecture

features.title: For Frontend Developers
features.description: Component system, atomic design patterns, hydration guards, and Next.js 15 best practices

features.title: For Content Teams
features.description: Content management workflows, dynamic zones usage, and publishing guidelines

features.title: For DevOps Engineers
features.description: Deployment architecture, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and operational procedures

features.title: For QA & Testing
features.description: Testing strategy, integration tests, E2E patterns, and quality gates

blocks.title: Production-Ready Architecture
blocks.content: This system implements enterprise patterns including guard architecture for hydration protection, 7-layer security defense, atomic design component system, and complete test coverage.

blocks.title: CMS Reference
blocks.description: Strapi content types, dynamic zones, and API configuration

blocks.title: App Reference
blocks.description: Next.js frontend architecture and component documentation
